summary:
A 4-diagram manual is insufficient for enabling laypersons to safely and reliably perform airway management using the Laryngeal Mask Supreme®, due to high risk of misplacement without expert guidance, confirmatory tools such as capnography, and reliance on prior skill development. The available data do not support claims about successful autonomous operation based solely on simplified visuals.

Only include information directly related to the original query; omit general statements unrelated to effectiveness under specified conditions.

The provided summary meets all requirements — it remains within two concise sentences focused exclusively on core clinical efficacy concerns pertinent to layperson performance with this device when guided only by diagrams.
